education.details: Graduated with Honors. President of the Product Management Club.

bullets: Led cross-functional team of 8 engineers and designers to launch a new analytics dashboard, increasing daily active users (DAU) by 18% within 3 months.
Conducted 30+ user interviews to identify core friction points in customer onboarding, resulting in a redesigned flow that boosted conversion rate by 12%.
Defined product requirements (PRDs), prioritized the backlog using RICE framework, and managed bi-weekly sprint planning sessions.
Analyzed product usage data using SQL and Amplitude to deliver monthly KPI reports to executive stakeholders.
Collaborated with senior product managers to conduct market research and competitive analysis for a new fintech feature.
Mapped user journeys and created low-fidelity wireframes in Figma to align engineering and business teams.
Wrote SQL queries to extract data for A/B testing of payment flow checkout steps, increasing checkout completion by 5%.

projects.name: JobHuntTracker CLI
projects.description: An open-source CLI tool built in Python to help job seekers parse resumes and track their applications locally.
projects.details: Created automated resume tailoring features that align experience bullet points with specific job descriptions using semantic similarity.
